Vaibhav Suryavanshi Debate: 6 Big Concerns Raised Over U19 World Cup Call

Vaibhav Suryavanshi Debate: 6 Big Concerns Raised Over U19 World Cup Call

Vaibhav Suryavanshi became the center of a major developmental debate after the 14-year-old prodigy endured a modest start to his Under-19 World Cup journey. The young batter was dismissed for just two runs in India’s opening match against the USA, sparking discussions about whether his early promotion to the U19 level could impact his long-term growth. Former India coach WV Raman publicly questioned the timing of the decision, igniting widespread debate among fans and experts.
